default.title: Horizon Tech | Enterprise Software, Cloud, and AI
default.description: Horizon Tech ishushanya kandi itanga software y'ubucuruzi, ibisubizo bya AI, ibikorwa remezo by'igicu, n'ibicuruzwa bya digitale ku matsinda akomeye.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Engineering Systems That Scale
home.description: Porogaramu y'ubucuruzi, AI / ML, ibikorwa remezo by'igicu, no gutanga IoT ku matsinda y'isi.

about.title: About Horizon Tech | Ubutumwa bw'isosiyete n'itsinda
about.description: Menya byinshi kuri Horizon Tech, ubutumwa bwacu, n'uburyo dutanga ibisubizo by'ikoranabuhanga rigezweho.

team.title: Team | Horizon Tech Leadership and Experts
team.description: Meet the engineers and leaders building enterprise software and cloud platforms at Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Careers | Kubaka hamwe na Horizon Tech
careers.description: Explore open roles and grow your career with Horizon Tech's engineering team.

contact.title: Contact Horizon Tech | Tangira umushinga wawe
contact.description: Vugana na Horizon Tech kugirango uganire ku mushinga wawe, ibyo ukeneye mu ikoranabuhanga, n'igihe cyo gutanga ibicuruzwa.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies | Horizon Tech Results
caseStudies.description: Read client case studies and results delivered by Horizon Tech across industries.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Technical insights, delivery lessons, and architecture guidance from Horizon Tech.

education.title: Education | Horizon Tech Learning Resources
education.description: Guides, references, and technical learning resources from Horizon Tech.

support.title: Support | Horizon Tech
support.description: Get support resources and contact options for Horizon Tech services.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Soma politiki y'ibanga ya Horizon Tech n'amasezerano yo kurinda amakuru.

terms.title: Terms of Service | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Soma amategeko agenga serivisi za Horizon Tech ku rubuga rwacu na serivisi.

profile.title: Profile | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Genzura umwirondoro wawe wa Horizon Tech, imiterere, n'amakuru ya konti.

firstTimeSetup.title: Uburyo bwa mbere bwo gutegura | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Complete first-time account setup to continue in Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Kongera kugera kuri konti yawe ya Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Kora ijambo ry'ibanga rishya kuri konti yawe ya Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Confirm Email | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Confirm your email address to activate your Horizon Tech account.

admin.title: Admin Panel | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Administration workspace for Horizon Tech platform management.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: You don't currently have access to this Horizon Tech page.

services.title: Services | Horizon Tech
services.description: Explore Horizon Tech services in software engineering, AI, cloud, DevOps, and digital transformation.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: See Horizon Tech experiments and prototypes in AI and applied engineering.

authCallback.description: Kuzuza kwiyandikisha mu buryo bwizewe kuri konti yawe ya Horizon Tech.
